For kitchen & bath businesses

Your free 30-minute strategy session

This is for owners who do great work but keep losing homeowners online. Here’s the playbook I’d normally save for paying clients:

  • The website secrets top kitchen & bath companies use to convert more homeowners
  • The ranking moves that put you above the businesses homeowners see first
  • The fastest way to rank in AI searches in 2026
  • How to get more homeowners clicking your website and Google profile
  • The exact 90-day gameplan to get your business winning more jobs (yours free)

You leave with the plan — yours to keep, even if we never work together.

1/3

A few quick details, there.

2/3

A little about your work.

Is your work mostly for homeowners, or builder and contractor accounts?

Roughly how many kitchens or baths a month?

3/3

There, what’s the one thing about getting found and getting picked online that’s eating at you most? (optional)

Don’t tidy it up. Give me the real version, in your own words. It’s the first thing I read before we talk.

Got your details. Pick a time that works.

You leave with the written plan whether we ever work together or not.

Calendar not loading? Open it in a new tab →

You’re on the books

You’re on the books, there.

Check your email for the time and the call link. Before we talk, I’ll dig into your business’s setup so we don’t waste a minute playing catch-up.

See you then.
— Shane
